mapper.select: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "dpg", SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "wxz" , SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "dys", COUNT(*) AS "sumCount" FROM E_MAINT_INFO WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND(MAINT_LEADER_ID=#{id} or DISPATCHER_ID= #{id} or CREATE_BY= #{id} or ACCEPTER_ID= #{id})
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "wj", SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "yj" FROM E_PATROL_TASK where PATROL_ID=#{id}
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "wj", SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "yj" FROM E_CHECK_TASK where INSPECTOR_ID=#{id}

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN PLAN_TYPE = '1' AND STATUS = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "drh", SUM(CASE WHEN PLAN_TYPE = '1' AND STATUS = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "yrh", SUM(CASE WHEN PLAN_TYPE = '2' AND STATUS = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "dby", SUM(CASE WHEN PLAN_TYPE = '2' AND STATUS = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "yby" FROM E_PM_MAINTAIN_TASK where INSPECTOR_ID=#{id}

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN DISPATCH_TYPE_CODE = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "nxgd", SUM(CASE WHEN DISPATCH_TYPE_CODE = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "dbgd" , SUM(CASE WHEN DISPATCH_TYPE_CODE = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "degd", SUM(CASE WHEN DISPATCH_TYPE_CODE = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "fdegd"
FROM E_MAINT_INFO WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND(MAINT_LEADER_ID=#{id} or DISPATCHER_ID= #{id} or CREATE_BY= #{id} or ACCEPTER_ID= #{id})

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN SOURCE =1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "tb", SUM(CASE WHEN SOURCE =2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "pg" , SUM(CASE WHEN SOURCE =3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "dj", SUM(CASE WHEN SOURCE =4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "rh", SUM(CASE WHEN SOURCE =5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "by", SUM(CASE WHEN SOURCE =6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "xj" FROM E_MAINT_INFO WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND TO_CHAR(CREATE_TIME, 'yyyy-MM-dd') >= TO_CHAR(#{date}, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AND(MAINT_LEADER_ID=#{id} or DISPATCHER_ID= #{id} or CREATE_BY= #{id} or ACCEPTER_ID= #{id})

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN EQUIP_BIG_CATEGORY_ID = '1991387653882384384' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "zxjx", SUM(CASE WHEN EQUIP_BIG_CATEGORY_ID = '1991387191070298112' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "cl" , SUM(CASE WHEN EQUIP_BIG_CATEGORY_ID = '1991387224960274432' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "cb", SUM(CASE WHEN EQUIP_BIG_CATEGORY_ID = '1991387706986467328' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "dlsb" FROM E_M_EQPT_INFO WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN EQUIP_STATE = '01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "zy", SUM(CASE WHEN EQUIP_STATE = '02' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "zx" , SUM(CASE WHEN EQUIP_STATE = '05' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "ty", SUM(CASE WHEN EQUIP_STATE = '06' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "bf" FROM E_M_EQPT_INFO WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "tbs", SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS in(1,2,4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "jxz", SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "ywc", to_char(CREATE_TIME,'yyyy-MM-dd') AS "createDate" FROM E_MAINT_INFO WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND CREATE_TIME>= #{startTime} AND CREATE_TIME <= #{endTime} AND(MAINT_LEADER_ID=#{id} or DISPATCHER_ID= #{id} or CREATE_BY= #{id} or ACCEPTER_ID= #{id}) GROUP BY to_char(CREATE_TIME,'yyyy-MM-dd')
